Class CooldownManager

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.skills.service.CooldownManager
public final class CooldownManager extends Object
Tracks per-player, per-ability cooldowns for active skills.

Thread-safe. Skills read and write cooldowns from their event handlers, which may run on the main thread or async. All state is cleared when a player is unloaded so memory does not leak on disconnect.

  • Constructor Details

    • CooldownManager

      public CooldownManager()

  • Method Details

    • getRemainingMillis

      public long getRemainingMillis(UUID uuid, String abilityId)
      Returns the milliseconds remaining on a cooldown as a signed value. A positive result means the cooldown is still active; zero or negative means it has expired (or was never set).

      Takes a single Instant.now() snapshot, so callers that need both an active check and a display value can derive both from one call:

          long ms = cooldowns.getRemainingMillis(uuid, id);
    if (ms > 0) {
        player.sendActionBar("..." + ms / 1000 + "s remaining.");
        return;
    }
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      abilityId - the ability identifier (e.g. "fishing:patient-angler")
      Returns:
      milliseconds until expiry, or 0 if not active

    • isOnCooldown

      public boolean isOnCooldown(UUID uuid, String abilityId)
      Returns whether the player is currently on cooldown for the given ability.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      abilityId - the ability identifier (e.g. "fishing:patient-angler")
      Returns:
      true if the cooldown has not yet expired

    • setCooldown

      public void setCooldown(UUID uuid, String abilityId, Duration duration)
      Starts a cooldown for the player on the given ability.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      abilityId - the ability identifier
      duration - how long the cooldown lasts

    • getRemainingSeconds

      public long getRemainingSeconds(UUID uuid, String abilityId)
      Returns the whole seconds remaining on a cooldown, or 0 if not active. Derives from getRemainingMillis(UUID, String) so both share a single time snapshot.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      abilityId - the ability identifier
      Returns:
      seconds remaining, minimum 0

    • clearPlayer

      public void clearPlayer(UUID uuid)
      Removes all cooldown state for a player. Call on player quit/unload.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
